headline: Stryker (SYK): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
summary: Over the last six months, Stryker shares have sunk to $342.00, producing a disappointing 7.6% loss - worse than the S&P 500’s 1.8% drop. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: Can 13-15% Procedure Growth in 2026 Sustain ISRG's Premium Valuation?
summary: Intuitive Surgical's 13-15% 2026 procedure growth signals durable demand and global expansion, but macro and policy risks could test its premium valuation.
